docs.title:
Welcome to

Server: PyrewoodVillage (EU) | Faction: Alliance

Welcome to our official guild repository. This site serves as our single source of truth for raid strategies, guild policies, and recruitment information.
📜 Quick Links
docs.text:
• 📢 Check Recruitment Status
  • ⚔️ Read the Raid Rules
  • 📅 Current Raid Schedule

Looking for our logs? Check us out on Warcraft Logs.

docs.title: 📅 Schedule
docs.text:
• Tuesday: 8:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST
  • Thursday: 8:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST
  • Optional Heroic/Alt Run: Sunday 8:00 PM EST

docs.title: 🎒 Preparation
docs.text:
• Consumables: Phials, Potions, and Food Buffs are required for every pull.
  • Addons: You must have BigWigs/DBM, WeakAuras, and Method Raid Tools installed.
  • Research: Review the Boss Guides before the first night of progression.

docs.title: 💰 Loot System
docs.text: We use Loot Council via the RCLootCouncil addon. Distribution is based on: 1. Size of Upgrade 2. Attendance & Reliability 3. Performance & Attitude

docs.title: Recruitment
docs.text: !!! info "Recruitment Status: OPEN" We are currently looking for exceptional players for the current tier. Even if your spec isn't listed below, feel free to apply!

docs.title: 🎯 High Priority Needs
docs.text: Role Class Specs 🛡️ Tank Death Knight Blood ⚔️ DPS Mage / Rogue Fire / Outlaw 📨 Healer Evoker Preservation

docs.title: 📝 How to Apply
docs.text:
1. Join our Discord.
  2. Navigate to the #apply channel.
  3. Fill out the application form pinned in the channel.

docs.title: Boss Name (The First Boss)
docs.text: !!! danger "Mechanic: The Big Exploding Circle" When you get the Red Debuff, move to the back of the room immediately. Failure to move will result in a raid wipe.

docs.title: 🛡️ Tanks
docs.text:
• Swap at 3 stacks of Heavy Smash.
  • Face the boss away from the melee group.

docs.title: ⚔️ DPS
docs.text:
• Focus the adds as soon as they spawn.
  • Save Bloodlust/Heroism for the 30% execute phase.

docs.title: 📨 Healers
docs.text:
• Heavy raid-wide damage occurs during the Scream phase.
  • Coordinate cooldowns for the second transition.
